candidates.title: Event Program Booklet / Brochure Design
candidates.tools: InDesign — Multi-page booklet layout, type hierarchy, CMYK + bleed/crop press-ready PDF — textbook InDesign.
candidates.brief: I'm producing a booklet-style brochure that will double as the official program guide for our upcoming event. All copy, sponsor logos and a rough page sequence will be in your hands as soon as we start; what I need is the design expertise that turns those raw assets into a cohesive, perfectly edited piece. Because we have no established colour palette or typography yet, you'll define a fresh but professional visual identity — selecting colours, fonts and layout accents that feel at home with the event's theme and audience. Every logo must appear crisp, proportionate and consistently placed, with plenty of white space so partners look their best. Please handle: layout of the full multi-page booklet, including front/back covers; creation of a simple but versatile colour scheme and type hierarchy; careful proofreading, alignment and image optimisation for print; delivery of a press-ready PD

candidates.title: 14-Page Franchise Prospectus Design
candidates.tools: Illustrator · InDesign — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: I’m looking for a designer-writer team that can turn our agriculture franchise story into a polished, 14-page prospectus aimed squarely at attracting new franchisees. We already have a full set of branding guidelines—logo usage, colour palette, fonts, image style—so every spread should stay on brand while still feeling fresh and impactful. Scope of work • Structure and layout the complete 14-page document, balancing copy, imagery and white space so it reads smoothly both on-screen and in print. • Craft or refine persuasive copy that highlights our market opportunity, support systems, training programme and projected returns—everything a potential franchisee needs to say “yes”. • Develop clear infographics and tables for key numbers and timelines. • Supply final files as press-ready PDF plus an editable source file (InDesign or Illustrator preferred). Acceptance criteria • Design adheres

candidates.title: Goalie Site & AppSheet Setup
candidates.brief: I run a youth goalie-training business in Ontario and I’m looking for someone to help finish two connected pieces of tech: a clean, modern website and a Google AppSheet registration app. The website is the priority. I need a polished, mobile-friendly site with a strong landing page, an About Us page, and a Services page. The style should feel modern, professional, and uncluttered, with strong visuals, clean typography, fast load times, and an easy path for parents to learn about the program and register. I also have a Google Sheets/AppSheet registration template already started. The structure is there, but I need help refining the workflows, validation rules, front-end layout, confirmation emails, and admin notifications. The goal is a simple parent-facing registration system that writes directly to my existing sheet and is easy for me to manage. I’m looking for someone who can provide a

candidates.title: Create Brochures from Content
candidates.brief: Upwork · Hourly I am looking for an experienced Canva graphic designer to design professional brochures for an educational program. What I need: Each brochure should be 1–2 pages, visually appealing, colorful, and professional Content for all brochures is already written and will be provided in Word/PDF format — you only need to do the design and layout Each brochure must have a unique design style, color scheme, and layout — no two should look alike Include relevant icons, illustrations, or stock images that match each brochure's theme (music, science, fitness, woodworking, drumming, etc.) Designs should look clean, modern, and school/education-friendly Final delivery in PDF and editable Canva file for each brochure Open the Upwork search this task was found in

candidates.title: Print Marketing Designer Needed for Luxury Educational Services Direct Mail Campaign
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price PRINT MARKETING DESIGNER NEEDED FOR SUMMER MAILER I own an established Houston-based educational consulting and tutoring company serving private-school families. I am looking for an experienced marketing designer/graphic designer to create a polished direct-mail marketing back-to-school promotional piece to go out the first week of July. We already have our logo, brand colors, program information, and existing marketing materials. I am looking for someone who can elevate the design and create a professional, visually appealing mailer that will resonate with private school parents. Ideal candidates will have experience with: • Direct mail • Brochures and postcards • Print marketing materials • Educational or family-focused businesses Please send: • Examples of similar print marketing projects • A brief description of your experience • Estimated timeline This is initia
